name: 陰謀揭露＋父子對峙
description: Tristan用錄音證據當面揭露Josh製造車禍的真相，同時控訴父親的操控，三方情感爆發。觀眾既解氣又感受到家庭悲劇的重量。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: It was you who caused the car accident. You who got me kicked out of the company. I'm blind because of you. / For my whole life, all you ever gave a damn about was who I could become for you.
